description: Composition Blue shirt kurta made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full front buttoned placket with multi-coloured fabric buttons, embroidered and sequined yoke that has lace detailing, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this shirt kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian arts that makes it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the colourful embroidery adds zing to the garment. Team it with jeans or leggings, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
